title: Color Functions in Graphical Abstracts: Highlight, Encode, and Natural Appearance

L2: Color can highlight, encode numbers, or show natural appearance in graphical abstracts
Three functions of color in scientific visual communication
L3: Figure 7 from the Ten Simple Rules paper demonstrating three functions of color in graphical abstracts: highlighting key elements, encoding quantitative data, and showing natural appearance of objects. Covers color accessibility considerations. CC BY 4.0.
